lesson.subtitle: Aula 4 -- Small Talk That Opens Doors -- Ice-Breakers Before Meetings
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Rafael de Andrade Brandão | Aula 4 -- Small Talk That Opens Doors

listenings.text: Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the Tech Connect Conference. Right now, people are arriving and finding their seats. The weather outside is beautiful today, so many guests are enjoying coffee on the terrace. We are starting the first session in ten minutes. During the coffee break, we are encouraging everyone to do some networking and meet new people. If this is your first trip to our event, please visit the welcome desk near the main door. Our team is waiting there to help you. We hope you are having a great time, and we wish you a wonderful day of learning and small talk.

Hi, this is Rafael. I am calling from the Tech Connect Conference here in the city. The event is going really well. Right now I am taking a short coffee break between sessions. I am meeting a lot of interesting people and doing some networking. I just talked to a woman named Diana about the weather and our weekend plans. How are things going at the office? Are you still working on the client report? Please call me back when you have a minute. I am leaving the conference around five, but the traffic is usually heavy at that time. Talk to you soon.

extra_audio.text: Rafael arrives at the conference and finds the welcome desk. He starts a conversation with Diana about the weather. They talk about their weekend plans and hobbies. During the coffee break, they do some networking. Rafael leaves the conference and drives home in heavy traffic.
